titles.title: He Is Able To Deliver Thee

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: 'Tis the grandest theme thro' the ages rung; 'Tis the grandest theme for a mortal tongue; 'Tis the grandest theme that the world e'er sung, "Our God is able to deliver thee."

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: 'Tis the grandest theme in the earth or main; 'Tis the grandest theme for a mortal strain; 'Tis the grandest theme, tell the world again, "Our God is able to deliver thee."

verse.name: v4
